dimension_notes.naming_quality: Strong: w_ratio/q_ratio/extract_bests snake_case aliases. _resolve_score_fn, resolve_scorer, ScorerProtocol all Pythonic. _BaseBM25 follows Python naming conventions.
dimension_notes.logic_clarity: Excellent: resolve_scorer single point of truth. _resolve_score_fn replaces hasattr chain with documented dispatch + early returns. Reranker blending consolidated into helper.
dimension_notes.type_safety: Protocol types (ScorerProtocol, RerankerProtocol, EmbeddingCallback) replace raw Any. resolve_scorer typed. Self for from_column. Remaining: PyO3 objects inherently Any.
dimension_notes.contract_coherence: Self return for from_column. Protocol types define interfaces. _resolve_score_fn documents dispatch contract. Rebuild cost documented.
dimension_notes.error_consistency: All from e chains preserved. RuntimeError for missing index. ValueError for explain. Reranker wraps model failures cleanly. Consistent patterns.
dimension_notes.abstraction_fitness: _BaseBM25 with 25+ shared methods eliminates all copy-paste across 4 variants. Protocol types define clear interfaces. _coerce_corpus handles all input formats.
dimension_notes.ai_generated_debt: Minimal: base class, resolve_scorer, Protocol types, _resolve_score_fn, consolidated blending eliminate all formulaic patterns.
dimension_notes.high_level_elegance: Clean: base class pattern, Protocol interfaces, _types.py central, documented Reranker dispatch. Logical module separation.
dimension_notes.mid_level_elegance: Excellent: resolve_scorer dedup, _resolve_score_fn clean dispatch, Reranker blending uses shared helper, _blend_reranked_scores single implementation.
dimension_notes.low_level_elegance: Rust editops hoisted. Python code clean. Early returns in dispatch. from e chains.
dimension_notes.cross_module_architecture: _types.py single source for types, protocols, helpers. No cross-module duplication. Clear import directions.
dimension_notes.initialization_coupling: Improved: add_documents/remove_documents now document O(n) rebuild cost with concrete guidance. Inherent to BM25 structure.
dimension_notes.convention_outlier: Much improved: w_ratio/q_ratio/extract_bests snake_case aliases added. WRatio/QRatio/extractBests kept for backward compat.
dimension_notes.dependency_health: Clean: from e chains. Optional deps lazy-imported with clear error messages. Protocol types stdlib-only.
dimension_notes.test_strategy: 66 parametrized BM25 variant tests + 10 langchain tests. Total 610. Strong coverage across all variants.
dimension_notes.api_surface_coherence: Improved: snake_case aliases alongside PascalCase originals. Protocol types define interfaces. BM25Algorithm documented.
dimension_notes.authorization_consistency: N/A - library. langchain lazy class pattern well-tested.
dimension_notes.incomplete_migration: _Result/_MetaResult aliases remain for backward compat only. All new code imports from _types.py.
dimension_notes.package_organization: _types.py centralizes shared concerns. Modules well-separated. search.py still at root but well-structured with _BaseBM25.
dimension_notes.design_coherence: Improved: _types.py central. Reranker dispatch documented. Blending consolidated. search.py well-structured with clear sections.

issues.summary: _search_query and _coerce_corpus use _ prefix but are imported cross-module
issues.suggestion: Acceptable: _ prefix signals internal use, even if shared across package modules.

issues.summary: Internal Rust index objects typed as Any
issues.suggestion: Limited by PyO3 — consider TYPE_CHECKING guard with stub.

issues.summary: Reranker model_or_callable still typed as Any
issues.suggestion: RerankerModel Protocol with optional predict/score.

issues.summary: search.py BM25 + HybridSearch + Reranker could be sub-package
issues.suggestion: Split into search/ sub-package if file grows further.

issues.summary: Editops backtrace allocates String per operation
issues.suggestion: Use enum type instead of string.

issues.summary: BM25 index rebuild is O(n) — inherent structural limitation
issues.suggestion: Now documented with O(n) guidance. No further action needed.

issues.summary: No hypothesis property-based tests
evidence: Fuzzy matching has invariants like symmetry
issues.suggestion: Add hypothesis tests for key invariants.

issues.summary: BM25Algorithm and BM25Variant use different casing convention
issues.suggestion: Document distinction.

issues.summary: extractOne still uses camelCase
issues.suggestion: Add extract_one alias.

issues.summary: embed_anything error message could include model_id
issues.suggestion: Include model_id in ImportError message.

issues.summary: _PROVIDER_SHORTCUTS could be a frozen dataclass
issues.suggestion: Acceptable for runtime flexibility.

issues.summary: _coerce_corpus in search.py extends compat.py _coerce_to_strings
issues.suggestion: Acceptable: different responsibilities — search handles Document types.

issues.summary: BM25 variant __reduce__ methods share similar structure
issues.suggestion: Acceptable: each has different constructor args.

issues.summary: Reranker wraps failures in generic RuntimeError
issues.suggestion: Consider custom RerankError.

issues.summary: engine.py imports 8+ symbols from search.py
issues.suggestion: Acceptable coupling for current module size.

issues.summary: Adaptive blend formula hardcodes 0.5 and 0.1 constants
issues.suggestion: Document the formula meaning.

issues.summary: Reranker rerank method repacks results with manual is_meta check
issues.suggestion: Could use isinstance or structural pattern matching.

issues.summary: _Result/_MetaResult aliases remain
issues.suggestion: Plan deprecation cycle.

issues.summary: All modules at root level
issues.suggestion: Consider sub-packages for growth.

issues.summary: langchain.py module __getattr__ for lazy class
issues.suggestion: Document pattern.
